name: The Compact Closes In
description: The Mage's Compact suspects someone in Vethara is doing unlicensed spell architecture. They're narrowing their search.
trigger_effect: A Compact investigator makes direct contact with Senna or Garion
increment_conditions: Senna uses magic in a public or semi-public space
A job goes loud and attracts official attention
The fence or another contact talks to the wrong person
Senna's research produces visible or audible effects outside the workshop
decrement_conditions: They acquire the Compact's informant list and act on it
A significant event draws the Compact's attention elsewhere

name: Adaptive Framework
description: Senna's primary research project. A spell framework that adapts dynamically to the caster's intent rather than firing as fixed effects.
trigger_effect: Senna achieves a working proof-of-concept — the framework functions as theorized
increment_conditions: A required component or text is acquired
decrement_conditions: Key materials are lost or destroyed
A critical assumption is proven wrong

name: What We Don't Say
description: Unresolved tension between Garion and Senna around risk, honesty, and the future. Fills from avoided conversations and deflected moments.
trigger_effect: A quiet moment arrives where the conversation they've been not having finally happens
increment_conditions: Garion downplays how dangerous a job was
Senna loses track of time and misses something that mattered to him
Either deflects a direct emotional question
Something almost goes very wrong and neither addresses it directly
decrement_conditions: One of them says something they've been not saying
